block_00: What events in 2020 affected the market the most
block_03: Hi there! This week we analyze the forecasts for 2021 in more detail. Find out what assets might be at the top and why you should pay attention to them now.
block_07: A global pandemic, an oil price war, and the U.S. election. What else affected the market in 2020? We start the year with an analysis of last year's main events that caused massive volatility on the trading market.

block_12: Choosing the Best Time to Trade
block_13: Forex is a 24/5 market: currency pairs are traded around the clock Monday to Friday. It is possible thanks to the combination of 4 overlapping trading sessions that facilitate continuous trading. So, what is the best time to trade?
block_16: Top 3 Assets With Price Growth Potential
block_18: Bitcoin’s stellar growth of more than 280% in 2020 is expected to continue, as the number of Bitcoin “whales” evaporates and the number of institutional investors and companies investing in Bitcoin is on the rise. After clearing the $20,000 threshold many investors expect it to even reach $40,000 within 2021. Some anticipate that it may reach six figure numbers in the not so distant future. One thing is sure though, Bitcoin is on a strong momentum that could easily continue in 2021.
block_20: Many investors anticipate Tesla’s phenomenal stock growth of more than 690% YTD in 2020 to continue this year. The company is firing on all cylinders with its innovative new battery technology, expansion in China, the low cost Model 3 and rising numbers of car sales. The growth looks set to continue in 2021 as the Biden Presidency is expected to favour green energy and electric vehicle stocks. The stock has a street-high price target of $788 according to TipRanks, although some analysts have become more pessimistic as to whether Tesla’s stock price can continue to rise after such a rally.
block_22: After clearing the resistance area at $500, Ethereum is up more than 260% YTD in 2020. A transition to the new Ethereum 2 network is progressing well and many analysts point that 2021 could be the year altcoins like Ethereum, Litecoin and others could shine. Fundamentals for Ethereum look solid as the new network will be faster, more efficient and offer more applications. The momentum is most certainly strong and many industry experts point that Ethereun could very easily reach $1,200 in 2021.
